build_env_note: Mriscoc/PlatformIO environment name only — not the physical chip. Required 512K profile for GD32F303RET6 Neo boards. Do not use STM32F103RC_creality (256K).

validated.baseline: Fully functional CoreXY bring-up: jog, home, dual tram, probe-reachable UBL mesh, OrcaSlicer profile. Not motion/quality tuned.
validated.mcu_note: Validated for GD32F303RET6 on Creality 4.2.2 Neo via Mriscoc STM32F103RE_creality (512K env name).

caveats: Functional but not tuned — accel/jerk/IS/Linear Advance and print centering still open
After flash: M502 then M500, re-set Z probe offset, confirm ProUI Physical Settings
UBL mesh bounds are probe-reachable (not full nozzle print area) — see docs/beta.md
Wrong build env (256K RC) can brick GD32 Neo boards — see docs/board-mcu.md
